title: Soulection White Label: 022
content:
Our 22nd White Label release is a special collection of pure house music crafted by California-based producer Jared Jackson. This four track project is stitched together with rolling bass lines, progressive melodies and an eclectic array of vocal samples. Infusing his own hip-hop and funk elements with deep house and UK garage-style percussion, Jackson gives us four original tracks with heavy rhythms intended for the dance floor.

“I want people to be reminded that so much of the electronic music we have come to admire was originally created by inner city youth, before it was adopted abroad. This is music that was developed in the ‘hood, much like hip hop.” 
— Jared Jackson
